title: aster hortensis
intro: Aster hortensis, also known as the smooth aster, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Aster hortensis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Aster hortensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to support overall health and well-being.
